canonical_answer: An older man with white hair wears a plaid shirt and blue apron while standing behind a wooden counter. He gestures with his hands over a large metal mixing bowl filled with chopped green leafy vegetables. A stainless steel microwave sits on a shelf in the background above rows of books. A logo for The Jacques Pépin Foundation appears in the bottom left corner of the screen. Various bottles and jars clutter the countertop near the bowl.

question: Describe the sequence of actions performed by the person wearing the blue apron during the preparation.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the man mixes greens in a metal bowl with his hands; at 6s, he gestures over the cluttered wooden counter; at 16s, yellow liquid is poured from a bottle into the bowl; at 18s, text overlay specifies the oil quantity while pouring continues.

question: Outline the visual changes occurring from the initial kitchen view to the ingredient addition.
canonical_answer: At 0s, an elderly man stands near an orange pot and white kettle; at 4s, a split screen title card displays while he tosses vegetables; at 16s, a close-up shows oil being poured into the bowl; at 18s, measuring text appears over the mixing process.
